author: Elijah Jero
name: PolyglotBridge
description: Link language-specific channels into translation bridges. Messages posted in one channel are automatically translated and relayed to every other channel in the bridge.
install_msg: PolyglotBridge loaded. Create a bridge with [p]polyglot create <name>, then add channels with [p]polyglot addchannel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data about users. This cog uses Google, Flowery, and optionally OpenAI/DeepL translation APIs.
